docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF DANIELLE LUCCHESI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHILIP WU IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES LAWRENCE WU (SON) AND SUSAN WU (WIFE). NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LUCCHESI, DANIELLE WU, PHILIP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY LUCCHESI, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT WU, PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCCHESI, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT WU, PHILIP

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCCHESI, DANIELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WU, PHILIP PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING ON HER COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN HER BURDEN OF PROOF. NO EVIDENCE WAS PRESENTED THAT DEFENDANT SOLD A CAR TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
